title: How to remove fog with Pure

messages.content: # Is your game too foggy and you cannot see anything? Follow this guide!

## Step 1:
> Open Pure Planner in-game, and click on 'P' to put it into Pure override mode.

## Step 2:
> Click on the current weather style you have selected and change it to No Clouds.

## Step 3:
> Close Pure Planner and take a look at the sky and you should have no more fog. Enjoy driving with clear skies!
